productDisplayName: Indigo Nation Men Tro Olive Trousers
description: Composition Structured brown trousers made of 65% polyester and 35% cotton 2 ply fabric, that has two insert pockets on the sides, two welt pockets on the back with buttoned closures, brand name appliqued on the back right pocket, comfortable waistband with loops, button and zipper closure on the front and extended hemline that can be reduced to suit the wearers height Fitting Regular Wash care Hand or machine wash with mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Dry in shade Warm iron Update your classic style with these smart brown trousers from indigo nation. These structured trousers made from 2 ply fabric have been specially washed to give it a great feel  and appearance. Look stylish and feel comfortable all day long in these trousers. You can team this with formal shirts and leather slip-ons for a confident, well groomed look.
